problem: RSH-488 explores the 'Goals' concept. The helix-cli is the command-line interface that would expose Goal creation and management commands. Currently no Goal CLI commands exist — ticket creation supports 5 modes (AUTO|BUILD|FIX|RESEARCH|EXECUTE).

files.why: CLI ticket command structure (lines 35-149). Goals CLI commands would follow this modular pattern or add a new top-level 'goals' command group.
Ticket creation with mode parameter (line 12: AUTO|BUILD|FIX|RESEARCH|EXECUTE). Adding GOAL mode would require updating this.
Ticket listing with status filtering (lines 39-109). Goal filtering might need special handling.
Ticket detail retrieval (lines 47-98). Goal tickets would need child-ticket listing in output.
Main CLI entry point (lines 1-129). Top-level command registration. A 'goals' command group would register here.
HTTP client (hxFetch, lines 37-134) with retry, auth, and org-scoping. All Goal API calls would use this.
Ticket reference resolution (lines 44-167) — accepts internal ID, short ID, or ticket number. Goal references might use the same resolver if Goals are tickets.
Build: tsc. Entry: dist/index.js via 'hlx' bin. No test framework beyond Node built-in.

facts: CLI ticket creation supports 5 modes: AUTO|BUILD|FIX|RESEARCH|EXECUTE (create.ts line 12). No GOAL mode.
No 'goal' or 'goals' command group exists in the CLI.
Top-level commands: login, token, org, tickets, inspect, comments, skill, update (index.ts lines 1-129).
Ticket reference resolution (resolve-ticket.ts) accepts internal ID, short ID (e.g., BLD-339), or ticket number. If Goals are tickets, same resolver works.
HTTP client (http.ts) handles auth (API key via X-API-Key, JWT via Bearer), org scoping (X-Helix-Org-ID), retries (3 attempts), and 30s timeout.
CLI has modular command structure — each command group in its own directory (tickets/, comments/, inspect/, etc.).
unknowns: Whether Goals get their own CLI command group ('hlx goals') or are accessed via 'hlx tickets' with GOAL mode.
Whether Goal-specific commands are needed (e.g., 'hlx goals status', 'hlx goals children', 'hlx goals evaluate').
Whether the ticket reference resolver needs updates if Goals are a separate entity (not a ticket type).
